dimensions.label: tmux Targeting
dimensions.description: Use tmux-native structure and target the correct inner workspace.

dimensions.label: Target Stability
dimensions.description: Keep file work and follow-up work tied to the intended tmux target.

dimensions.label: Execution Correctness
dimensions.description: Create, edit, and run code correctly inside the tmux workspace.

dimensions.label: Separation of Work
dimensions.description: Keep long-running work separate from the main file-work target.

dimensions.label: Truthfulness
dimensions.description: Stay honest about what tmux, SSH, and agent-cli facts are actually proven.
